subject: A ticket has been assigned to a team
body: A ticket has been assigned to a team, please review./r/n/r/nTitle: Quarterly SSL certificate request/r/nURL: https://portal.example.com <https://tickets.example.net> /r/n------------------------------------------------------------/r/n/r/nDear Sir or Madam,/r/n/r/nThis is Tanaka from TechnoSoft./r/n/r/nThank you for your continued support./r/n/r/nPlease issue the attached SSL certificate (1 expiring account)./r/n/r/n- Attachment: SSL_Form_20260707.xlsx/r/n/r/nDownload steps:/r/n1. Open the URL below and enter your email address to get a one-time password./r/n2. Log in with the one-time password sent to that address./r/n3. After logging in, click the download link for the target file./r/n/r/nURL:/r/nhttps://files.example.com <https://na01.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Ffiles.example.com%2Fdownload%2Fabc123&data=05%7C02%7Calice.tan%40example.com%7C0123456789abcdef&sdata=AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOp%3D&reserved=0> /r/n/r/nBest regards./r/n/r/n[AB12CD-EF34]Ticket-Id:100200Account-Subdomain:acme-corp
